summary: Good‑quality audience tape that captures a solid show with standout Eyes of the World and Fire on the Mountain moments.
review: The reviewer praises the vibe of this audience recording, noting the room ambience and calling it a good document of an excellent run. Highlights include a strong performance of “Eyes of the World” and a decent “Fire on the Mountain” breakout, though the overall rating is modest (3 stars). No specific technical flaws are mentioned.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review; positive comments about the show and ambience but a 3‑star score keeps the overall rating in the low‑mid range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Vibe of the room is highlighted; recording captures audience atmosphere well with no reported clarity issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set pacing or flow were provided.
